mapper.sql: SELECT g.game_id, g.game_name, g.category_id, c.category_name, g.publisher, g.developer, g.description, g.cover_image, g.price, g.original_price, g.stock, g.sales, g.release_date, g.language, g.rating, g.status, g.is_hot, g.is_new, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark FROM ps5_game g LEFT JOIN ps5_category c ON g.category_id = c.category_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ps5_game (game_name, category_id, publisher, developer, description, cover_image, price, original_price, stock, sales, release_date, language, rating, status, is_hot, is_new, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{gameName}, #{categoryId}, #{publisher}, #{developer}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{releaseDate}, #{language}, #{rating}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{isNew}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ps5_game WHERE game_id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE ps5_game SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
UPDATE ps5_game SET sales = sales + #{quantity}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE game_id = #{gameId}
